items.title: Anthropic Accidentally Takes Down Thousands of GitHub Repos Containing Leaked Claude Source Code
items.summary: Anthropic faced a major incident, accidentally issuing DMCA takedowns for thousands of GitHub repositories while attempting to remove its recently leaked Claude source code.

items.title: The Great Claude Code Leak of 2026: Accident, Incompetence, or PR Stunt?
items.summary: Speculation mounts regarding the recent Claude code leak, questioning whether it was an accident, a display of incompetence, or a calculated public relations maneuver by Anthropic.

items.title: Cognichip Raises $60M to Develop AI for Designing AI Chips
items.summary: Cognichip secured $60 million in funding to pursue its ambitious goal of using artificial intelligence to design the very chips that power AI systems.

items.title: FIPO: Eliciting Deep Reasoning with Future-KL Influenced Policy Optimization
items.summary: New research introduces FIPO, a policy optimization method designed to elicit deeper reasoning capabilities in AI models through future-KL influence.

items.title: Meta's Massive Natural Gas Consumption for AI Infrastructure Could Power South Dakota
items.summary: Meta's substantial investment in natural gas to fuel its AI infrastructure raises environmental concerns, with its energy demands potentially equivalent to powering an entire state like South Dakota.

items.title: CARLA-Air: A Unified Infrastructure for Air-Ground Embodied Intelligence in Drone Simulation
items.summary: CARLA-Air presents a novel unified infrastructure that allows for the simulation of drones within the CARLA world, advancing research in air-ground embodied intelligence.

items.title: LongCat-Next: Lexicalizing Modalities as Discrete Tokens for Enhanced Multimodal AI
items.summary: LongCat-Next proposes a method for lexicalizing different modalities as discrete tokens, potentially leading to more efficient and powerful multimodal AI models.

items.title: Gradient Labs Partners with OpenAI to Provide AI Account Managers for Bank Customers
items.summary: Gradient Labs is leveraging OpenAI technology to offer every bank customer an AI-powered account manager, aiming to revolutionize financial services.

items.title: Project Imaging-X: A Survey of 1000+ Open-Access Medical Imaging Datasets for Foundation Models
items.summary: Project Imaging-X provides a comprehensive survey of over a thousand open-access medical imaging datasets, crucial for developing foundation models in healthcare AI.

items.title: Lingshu-Cell: A Generative Cellular World Model for Transcriptome Modeling Towards Virtual Cells
items.summary: Lingshu-Cell introduces a generative cellular world model capable of transcriptome modeling, paving the way for the creation of virtual cells in biological research.

items.title: Google AI Announces New Satellite Imagery Map to Combat Brazilian Deforestation
items.summary: Google AI is developing a new satellite imagery map to aid in the protection of Brazil's forests by monitoring and detecting deforestation.

items.title: OpenAI Outlines Strategy for Accelerating the Next Phase of AI Development
items.summary: OpenAI shares its vision and strategic initiatives for rapidly advancing the next generation of artificial intelligence technologies.

items.title: GEMS: Agent-Native Multimodal Generation with Memory and Skills
items.summary: GEMS proposes a new framework for agent-native multimodal generation, integrating memory and skills to enhance AI agent capabilities.

items.title: VGGRPO: Towards World-Consistent Video Generation with 4D Latent Reward
items.summary: VGGRPO presents a novel approach for video generation that utilizes a 4D latent reward mechanism to achieve more world-consistent and realistic video outputs.

items.title: OpenAI Introduces New Policies to Help Developers Build Safer AI Experiences for Teens
items.summary: OpenAI has released updated policies and safeguards for GPT models to assist developers in creating safer AI experiences specifically for teenage users.
